videos.headline: Jaivian Thomas breaks free for 49-yard Cal TD
videos.description: Jaivian Thomas sprints 49 yards untouched for California's first touchdown, taking an early lead over NC State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaivian Thomas breaks free for 49-yard Cal TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hollywood Smothers makes the catch and bobs and weaves for NC State TD
videos.description: CJ Bailey connects with Hollywood Smothers for a 41-yard touchdown, putting NC State ahead 24-23 over Cal.
